html:
Exclusive to:
See also: Marble Tree

A Marble Sprout is a sapling exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It grows from a Marble Bean, can be dug out by Shovel/Regal Shovel and drop a Marble Bean.

A Marble Shrub is an object similar to a Tree exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It grows from a Marble Sprout and requires a Pickaxe to mine like a Marble Tree or a Petrified Tree.

Size Drops
1x
1x + (25%)
1x + 1x (or)

There are three variants that can grow, the Round, Cubic and Pyramid.

Its growth cycle is slower than an Evergreen's. It takes 0.3125-0.625 days for a Marble Sprout (planted bean) to grow to a Stage 1 Marble Shrub, then 5-6.25 days to Stage 2 and another 5-6.25 days to Stage 3. It stays at Stage 3 for 5-6.25 days before reverting to a Stage 1 Shrub again. Growing is not affected by Seasons, but a survivor needs to be within 2-3 screens of marble during Stage 2 before Stage 3 growth can begin. A reasonable strategy for fast growth would be to plant the marble, observe on day 7, and harvest 6 days later on day 13.

Harvesting

Marble shrubs are fire resistant, but can be destroyed with pickaxe or Structure-damaging features. Destroying a Stage 3 shrub takes 10 swings of a pickaxe, 7 by a mighty Wolfgang, 5 by a player who consumed Honey Crystals, or 4 by Wolfgang with honey crystals. A Clockwork Rook can be taunted to harvest clumps of marble shrubs rapidly. A forest type Reanimated Skeleton attracted by a Shadow Thurible will serve the same purpose. 1 Gunpowder or 10 Slurtle Slime is required for exploding/harvesting a Stage 3 shrub, but can explode up to 8 tightly spaced shrubs at once. Befriended Merms will mine Marble Shrubs quickly and safely.

Trivia

  • Marble Shrubs were added in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update.
  • Maxwell and Wortox's quotes for the Marble Shrub are a reference to Monty Python and the Holy Grail.

Gallery

  • The teaser poster for the Cute Fuzzy Animals update featuring Marble Shrubs.
  • The old version of a Marble Sprout.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“Makes sense to me.”
–Wilson
“What sort of bush doesn't burn?!”
–Willow
“Rock is strongest bush!”
–Wolfgang
“Against all odds, it has flourished in life...”
–Wendy
“INFERIORITY ASSESSMENT: INCONCLUSIVE”
–WX-78
“Not ideal for topiary.”
–Wickerbottom
“Defo can't chop that.”
–Woodie
“I've found a shrubbery.”
–Maxwell
“Tis a shrub öf stöne!”
–Wigfrid
“That's a weird shape for a bush.”
–Webber
“If marble beans can grow, maybe they can be eaten.”
–Warly
“Stone? Stone friend?”
–Wormwood
“That came in pretty nicely.”
–Winona
“A shubbery!”
–Wortox
“Rock bush.”
–Wurt
“This place is weird.”
–Walter
“What a nicely sculpted topiary.”
–Wanda
